commentaries.author: Cyril of Alexandria
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But let justice run down as waters, and righteousness as a mighty stream. Cyril of Alexandria Namely the righteous verdict against you-will be like an impassable torrent, that is, dragging away what falls into it and sparing nothing, since torrents descend from the mountains with a rush. This is also the way with the divine verdict: if it is delivered against some people, it will be nothing other than invincible water and an irresistible torrent.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Mighty. Hebrew, "Ethan. "Let your virtue appear, or the greatest miseries will shortly overwhelm you. (Calmet)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
